name: opc-board
tagline: OPC Board: 5 advisors stress-test your solo business idea / 一人董事会：五位专业顾问压测你的想法
description: Friends say 'sounds great.' AI says 'wonderful idea.' What you need is someone willing to push back. OPC Board gives you 5 professional advisors who stress-test your solo idea across 5 dimensions — 25 sub-items, formula-scored, no guesswork — and output a Go/No-Go feasibility report with OPC Decision Card, MoSCoW scoping, Pre-Mortem risks, and action plan. 朋友说好棒，AI 说 wonderful idea，你真正需要的是愿意拍砖的人。一人董事会为你召集 5 位专业顾问，五维 25 子项确定性打分，输出 Go/No-Go 评估报告和行动清单。
author: Chris1Wang3
